data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of group coordination for split payments. However, the evidence does not demonstrate that the system supports this functionality, as it lacks specific details on how payments are split among multiple customers. The linked use case mentions that 'one pays, others pay share via split,' but does not provide concrete evidence of the implementation or API endpoints that facilitate this feature.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or mechanisms for handling split payments among multiple customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
